title: Arda III
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Arda III |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of grid square Q-6 in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]. |sector=*[[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] **[[Back Reach]] |system=[[Arda system/Legends|Arda system]] |coordinates=Q-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns=1: [[Ethain]]''[[Onslaught at Arda I]]'' |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Ardan Cross]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=None |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Sir! Message's origin is determined to be in the vicinity of Arda planets One, Two and Three!''"
"''Prepare to destroy all three, if necessary!|An [[Imperial Navy Trooper/Legends|Imperial Navy Trooper]], to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|"[[As Long As We Live...]]"}} '''Arda III''' was an [[Factory world/Legends|industrial world]] located in the [[Arda system/Legends|Arda system]], a part of the [[Back Reach]] area of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] within the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Ardan Cross]] connected it to the [[Feldwes system/Legends|Feldwes]] and [[Kalishik system/Legends|Kalishik systems]], and another hyperlane linked it to the [[Capella system/Legends|Capella system]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was sparsely populated. ==Appearances== *''[[Onslaught at Arda I]]'' {{Mo}} {{1stID|Arda III}} *"[[As Long As We Live...]]" {{Reprint|As Long As We Live...}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Arda-3 }} [[Category:Arda system locations]] [[Category:Factory worlds]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Trans-Hydian Borderlands]]
